title: Cheesy Thai Noodle Delight
description: A simple yet flavorful Thai-inspired dish loaded with cheese, noodles, and a hint of spice. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the fish sauce and stir to combine.
Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted and well combined.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to coat with the cheese and curry mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve immediately with fresh lime wedges on the side.
